title: Effects Remider
description: This mod makes a sound every time a whitelisted effect expires!
body:
### **EFFECTS REMINDER**

## Features
- Sound before effect ends
- Sound after effect ends
- Effects whitelist
- Fully configurable first alert

## GUI
![gui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d58aaf1f4db302f99c2c45d8e1515403b340f2f6_0.webp)
